creator: barbara.xxx1975@libero.it
text:
>	
 >>Description:
 >Several GNOME-related ports pass "--with-gconf-source" to configure,
 >which then triggers warnings that this option is not recognized.
 >
 >Please check if that isa leftover or intentional, and possibly fix
 >bsd.gnome.mk if needed.
 >	
 
 A warning is triggered also because of "--with-libjasper" in x11-
 toolkits/gtk20.
 
 Barbara
